items.title: Solana: Pump.fun transfers over 68K SOL, yet buyers refuse to panic – Why?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite a significant transfer of SOL, market stability suggests confidence in Solana's fundamentals and resilience against potential sell-offs.

items.title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The draining of Bonk's treasury highlights vulnerabilities in governance structures, which could impact investor trust and future liquidity in Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: SpaceX IPO powers record $3.86 billion in tokenized equities trading in June
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in tokenized equities trading indicates growing interest in blockchain applications, potentially enhancing Solana's positioning as a platform for innovative financial products.
